properties.body:
HYDROARC 55/26.
MARITIME CONTENT DISSEMINATION PORTAL (MCDP) ADVISORY
NGA IS AWARE OF AN ISSUE RESULTING IN A
LOGIN LOOP FOR SOME USERS ATTEMPTING TO
ACCESS NGA???S MARITIME CONTENT DISSEMINATION
PORTAL (HTTPS://MARITIME.GEO.NGA.MIL).
NGA IS INVESTIGATING FURTHER. AT THIS TIME,
IMPACTED USERS SHOULD ENSURE THEIR EMAIL
ADDRESS HAS BEEN ADDED TO THEIR GEOAXIS PROFILE
AT HTTPS://PORTAL.GEOAXIS.GS.MIL/USER.
USERS ARE ALSO ADVISED TO CLEAR THEIR WEB BROWSER
CACHE AND TRY ANOTHER WEB BROWSER.
ESYNC (HTTPS://ESYNC.NGA.MIL) REMAINS FULLY AVAILABLE
AND CAN BE USED TO UPDATE CHARTS AND ENC REGIONS
PREVIOUSLY RECEIVED FROM NGA.
IF YOU REQUIRE FURTHER ASSISTANCE, INCLUDING REQUESTS
FOR DIRECT DOWNLOADS VIA DOD SAFE,
PLEASE CONTACT MARHELP@NGA.MIL.
